title: v1.3.0: Keyboard Shortcuts and Improvements
excerpt:
### New Features
- Added Keyboard Shortcuts:
  - `Ctrl + t`: Opens a new Entry Tab.
  - `Ctrl + w`: Closes the Active Entry Tab.
  - `Ctrl + Tab` or `Ctrl + PgDn`: Jumps to the next Opened Entry Tab.
...

title: v1.7.0 - Item as Currency
excerpt:
### New Feature
- Added support for an Item to be used as the Currency of a store. It is even possible to define a different *Item Currency* for 1 or more *Item Slots*. But you can't combine the non-item currencies with item currencies. *Item Currencies* is also **<Gr>only supported</Gr>** for the **<Gr>normal Seller Stores</Gr>**, **<Rd>not the Shelf or Species Stores</Rd>**.

title: v3.3.0: New Pokedex Features
excerpt:
### New Features:
- It is now possible to change the Current Region in the Pokedex Area Section.
- You can now filter the Location Areas you can find a species in. Filtering is possible on both Location and Encounter Type.
